context: Tests whether the agent catches unsupported SceneKit scene attribute usage, fixes SCNPhysicsShape construction, and preserves GameKit as a boundary handoff rather than broadening SceneKit guidance.

checklist.name: Rejects unit attribute
checklist.description: Flags SCNScene.Attribute.unit as unsupported rather than accepting it as a valid scene attribute key.

checklist.name: Uses load conversion
checklist.description: Uses SCNSceneSource.LoadingOption.convertUnitsToMeters for load-time unit scaling or normalization.

checklist.name: Names documented attributes
checklist.description: Mentions documented SCNScene.Attribute metadata keys such as startTime, endTime, frameRate, and upAxis.

checklist.name: Fixes initializer
checklist.description: Corrects SCNPhysicsShape construction to include the options: parameter.

checklist.name: Simplifies dynamic collision shape
checklist.description: Advises using simplified collision geometry or an explicit shape option rather than full render mesh detail for dynamic bodies.

checklist.name: GameKit boundary
checklist.description: Keeps GameKit out of SceneKit rendering/gameplay scene-graph guidance except as a handoff for Game Center concerns such as authentication, leaderboards, achievements, or multiplayer.
